name: 13x13 Colourful Castle
description: A classic, high-energy bounce house with bright primary colours. Fits up to 6 kids at once and is perfect for ages 3–12. Safe enclosed netting on all sides.

name: Jurassic Jump
description: At age 6, kids love themed adventures! This TSSA-certified dinosaur bounce house brings prehistoric fun to any party. Features T-Rex graphics and jungle obstacles.

name: Spiderman Combo
description: If you want to upgrade the fun, this combo unit includes a bounce area, climbing wall, and slide — all wrapped in Spiderman graphics. Superhero party essential.

name: Princess Castle Combo
description: Every little princess deserves a magical party! This pink-and-purple castle combo features a bounce area, slide, and sparkling turrets. Girls aged 3–10 absolutely love it.

name: Mega Water Slide
description: Beat the heat with our 18-foot dual-lane water slide. Kids race side by side to the splash pool at the bottom. Perfect for summer birthday parties and backyard fun.

name: Obstacle Course
description: Tunnels, climbing walls, pop-ups, and a slide — this 40-foot obstacle course is a hit at corporate events, school picnics, and large birthday parties. Handles big crowds.

name: Toddler Soft Play Zone
description: Designed for the littlest guests (ages 1–4), this soft play zone features gentle foam-padded shapes, a mini slide, and a ball pit. Safe, supervised fun for toddlers.

name: Dunk Tank
description: A party crowd-pleaser! Put the teacher, coach, or parent on the hot seat and let kids throw to dunk them. Great for school events, fundraisers, and large birthday parties.

name: Popcorn Machine
description: Nothing says 'party' like the smell of fresh movie-theatre popcorn! Includes the machine, supplies for 50 servings, and bags. Easy to operate — plug in and pop!

name: Cotton Candy Machine
description: Spin up fluffy clouds of cotton candy in pink and blue! Includes machine, supplies for 50 servings, and cones. Kids go absolutely wild for this one.

name: Snow Cone Machine
description: Cool down guests with icy-cold snow cones in a rainbow of flavours. Includes machine, ice, syrup (6 flavours), and 50 cups. A summer party essential.

name: Tables & Chairs Package (10 tables, 80 chairs)
description: Everything you need to seat your guests. Includes 10 folding banquet tables (8-foot) and 80 white folding chairs. Delivery and pickup included.

name: 20x20 Party Tent
description: Keep your guests covered rain or shine. Our 20x20 white canopy tent provides shade for up to 60 guests. Perfect addition to any outdoor event.

name: Balloons Lawn Sign
description: A great way to let the neighbourhood know where the party is! Customized lawn sign with name and age, surrounded by a balloons bouquet. Setup included.

name: Photo Booth
description: Capture memories! Our photo booth includes a backdrop, props box, and instant photo printer. Prints 4x6 photo strips that guests keep as favours.

name: Carnival Games Package (5 games)
description: Five classic midway games: ring toss, duck pond, fishing game, bean bag toss, and ball roll. Includes prizes. Great for all ages at school events and large parties.
